dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, your work to {quest_action} has stirred up a hornet's nest. The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} aware someone is coming for them.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They sent {enemy_type} to strike at the {quest_stakes} as a warning. {quest_ally} fended them off, but they hit hard. They are massing {location_hint} near the {quest_focus}. We cannot let this go unanswered.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every day they draw breath is an insult to the ones we lost. Finish it.

playerResponses.text: Warnings do not frighten me. I will see this through.
They are fighting back hard. I will need more supplies.
This cycle of violence is pointless.

dialogueChunks.intro: Your pursuit to {quest_action} flushed them out, {player_name}. But the {quest_threat} scattered and regrouped closer to the {quest_focus}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} says the {enemy_type} are dug in deep {location_hint}. They are using the {quest_focus} as a strongpoint. We need to root them out before they can retaliate against the {quest_stakes} again.
dialogueChunks.outro: We are close. One more push and this will be over.

playerResponses.text: One more push. I can do that.
They keep regrouping. Are you sure this will end?

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the situation has shifted. Since you started to {quest_action}, the {quest_threat} retaliated by targeting our supplies.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They raided the stores near the {quest_focus} and the {enemy_type} are blocking the routes {location_hint}. {quest_ally} is rallying the community, but they need a fighter. Secure {quest_item} and clear the path.
dialogueChunks.outro: Our kin deserve better than to be terrorized. End this threat for good.

playerResponses.text: Striking at supplies is cowardly. I will cut them off.
This keeps escalating. Fine, one more time.
I signed up for vengeance, not a war.
